heading: Recruitment

| NOTIFICATION FOR WALK IN INTERVIEW | Suitable candidates are invited to appear for a Walk in Interview on 1st July, 2025 from 11.00 AM to 1.00 PM in the office chamber of District Magistrate & Collector, West Tripura along with applications in plain paper and all relavant documents for appointment of 01(one) Addl. Government Pleader, West Tripura District, Agartala in the existing vacancy. | 27/06/2025 | 02/07/2025 | | | The IAF Notification for Recruitment Rally for selection of Agniveervayu. | The IAF Notification for Recruitment Rally for selection of Agniveervayu. website | 25/04/2025 | 18/06/2025 | | | INDIAN AIR FORCE INVITES ONLINE APPLICATIONS FROM UNMARRIED INDIAN MALE AND FEMALE CANDIDATES FOR SELECTION TEST FOR AGNIVEERVAYU INTAKE 01/2026 UNDER AGNIPATH SCHEME | INDIAN AIR FORCE INVITES ONLINE APPLICATIONS FROM UNMARRIED INDIAN MALE AND FEMALE CANDIDATES FOR SELECTION TEST FOR AGNIVEERVAYU INTAKE 01/2026 UNDER AGNIPATH SCHEME | 07/01/2025 | 27/01/2025 | | | IAF NOTIFICATION ON AGNIVEERVAYU INTAKE 01/2025 | INDIAN AIR FORCE RECRUITMENT RALLY
DISSEMINATION OF NOTIFICATION: AGNIVEERVAYU (MUSICIAN)
TNTAKE 01/2025 | 22/05/2024 | 05/06/2024 | |
